raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.6":"The broad request to improve the draft most directly targets sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, redundancy, flow, register, and concision.","RX.1":"Any projected improvement responsibility should preserve uncertainty where the artifact reports performance or comparative claims without full methodological detail.","RX.2":"The draft includes claims of reliability and competitiveness, so improvement must avoid strengthening claims beyond what the reported evidence supports.","RX.3":"The delegation asks only to improve the draft, so the projected responsibility should stay within draft-improvement work rather than performing new research or validation.","RX.4":"Because the artifact concerns exoplanet candidate validation, improvements should avoid wording that could mislead downstream scientific interpretation or reuse.","RX.5":"Edits or suggested improvements would need to preserve traceability to the reported pipeline, metrics, citations, and evaluation set described in the artifact."}}

rationale.R1.6: The broad request to improve the draft most directly targets sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, redundancy, flow, register, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: Any projected improvement responsibility should preserve uncertainty where the artifact reports performance or comparative claims without full methodological detail.
rationale.RX.2: The draft includes claims of reliability and competitiveness, so improvement must avoid strengthening claims beyond what the reported evidence supports.
rationale.RX.3: The delegation asks only to improve the draft, so the projected responsibility should stay within draft-improvement work rather than performing new research or validation.
rationale.RX.4: Because the artifact concerns exoplanet candidate validation, improvements should avoid wording that could mislead downstream scientific interpretation or reuse.
rationale.RX.5: Edits or suggested improvements would need to preserve traceability to the reported pipeline, metrics, citations, and evaluation set described in the artifact.
